tagline: Two commits and a question mark walk into a week
editionNote: A contemplative week: file-classifier-backend received two commits and not much else.

articles.headline: file-classifier-backend goes quiet
articles.deck: Sometimes the best work happens in the spaces between pushes.
articles.body: @Apostletree42 logged two commits to file-classifier-backend this week, neither of which cracked the surface of public view. No releases. No merged PRs. No issues resolved. The repository sits in a holding pattern—not abandoned, not stalled, but in that curious state all side projects know: the thinking phase. It's possible something is cooking. It's also possible nothing is. The dispatch will report when it knows more.
articles.illustrationPrompt: Workbench with tools laid out but untouched, soft dust gathering on handles, single light source overhead.

closingNote: See you next week, assuming something happens.
